summary: A Go-based testing and validation framework featuring detection, assertion running, and JUnit reporting with Kubernetes and plugin support.
concerns: High frequency of automated session metadata commits cluttering git history
Key hot files are primarily tests, suggesting core logic may be under-documented or fragmented
suggestions: Add .gitignore rules for automated session metadata files to reduce commit noise
Commit or ignore the 3 untracked files to clean up the working tree
Focus on core implementation files (e.g., detector.go, schema.go) rather than just tests for deeper understanding
